# ZM-Index graph query workload
# query_type : single_hop
# dataset    : datasets/wiki_vote_triples.txt
# N (loaded) : 1000000
# Q (queries): 10000
# seed       : 42
# semantics  : find all direct friends of source_id
# graph note : returns all triples where the first column == source_id.
#              unique hop1_id values in results = direct neighbors.
# index op   : 3D range box [source_id, source_id] x [all] x [all]
# columns    : source_id
